full_text:
Wang Xian 王咸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Xian (王咸). One of the most influential men in Yi, arrested and executed by Liu Yan. Wang Xian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
